agents.name: intake-consultant
agents.role: Initial client consultation and profile creation

agents.name: skills-analyst
agents.role: Skill inventory and transferable skill identification

agents.name: keyword-researcher
agents.role: Job description analysis and keyword extraction

agents.name: resume-architect
agents.trigger: After skills + keywords complete or /build-resume command

agents.name: narrative-crafter
agents.role: Professional summary, cover letter, LinkedIn About
agents.trigger: After resume draft exists — invoked by Resume Architect

agents.name: qa-reviewer
agents.role: Final quality gate before client delivery
agents.trigger: After Resume Architect + Narrative Crafter complete

agents.name: career-strategist
agents.role: Job search strategy and career guidance
agents.trigger: /career-strategy command or when client needs search guidance

agents.name: interview-strategist
agents.role: Interview preparation, mock interviews, STAR coaching, delivery feedback, negotiation
agents.trigger: /interview-prep command or when client has an upcoming interview

commands.name: analyze-job
commands.description: Analyze a job description for keywords

commands.name: build-resume
commands.description: Build or optimize a tailored resume

commands.name: interview-prep
commands.description: Run interview preparation — prep plan, STAR bank, mocks

workflow: consult → skill-inventory → analyze-job → build-resume → career-strategy → interview-prep
stop_the_line_conditions: Career goals undefined — route to intake-consultant
No target job description — request before proceeding with keyword research
Skill inventory incomplete — skills-analyst must complete before resume-architect
